title: Deconfounded Failure Prediction from Motif Spectra on 176 Verified Attribution Graphs
summary: Demo notebook for deconfounded failure prediction on 28 verified attribution graphs (14 correct, 14 incorrect across 7 domains). Computes motif census, graph statistics, and domain indicators, then runs a hierarchical classifier battery (5 feature sets x 2 classifiers) with stratified 5-fold CV, bootstrap AUC comparisons, within-domain LOO analysis, and motif deviation features. Uses compact graphs (top-150 edges by weight) from the Neuronpedia corpus. Full original parameters (N_NULL=30, N_BOOTSTRAP=1000) run in ~5.4 seconds. Includes visualization of AUC comparison and feature importance.
